g.text: PREPARE - ErGwScale providioned alognside ErGW1AZ (no traffic impact, ~20-40min)
EXECUTE - Connections transferred to ErGwScale; brief BGP reconvergence occurs
COMMIT / ABORT - ErGW1AZ deleted (commit) or ErGWScale removed (rollback)
SCENARIO 2 — Customer-Controlled Gateway Migration (prepareMigration → executeMigration → commitMigration / abortMigration) | scripts/4-scenario2-migrate-ergw.sh
